settings.title: Midland Floors in DC & Maryland, Delivers
settings.subtitle: About
settings.content: Midland has cleaned, restored, and refinished floors across Washington D.C., Maryland, and Virginia for years. Whether you're a homeowner in Bethesda who wants the carpets ready before family visits, or a property manager in Arlington who needs 40,000 sq ft of office tile cleaned overnight — same playbook: show up on time, do the work right, leave the place better than we found it.

settings.editor:
RESIDENTIAL SERVICES  

 Residential Carpet, Hardwood & Floor Cleaning Across the DMV

  • Carpet Cleaning — Hot-water extraction (steam) that lifts dirt, allergens, and odors. Safe for kids and pets. Stain protection available.
  • Pet Stain & Odor Removal — Enzyme treatments that neutralize accidents at the pad — not just the surface.
  • Area Rug Cleaning — In-home cleaning for wool, synthetic, and Oriental rugs. Pickup-and-delivery available for fine rugs.
  • Hardwood Floor Cleaning & Refinishing — Buff-and-recoat or full sand-stain-seal. We'll tell you which one your floors actually need.
  • Tile & Grout Cleaning — Bring grout lines back to original color. Optional sealing keeps it clean for years.
  • Upholstery & Leather Cleaning — Sofas, sectionals, dining chairs, mattresses, and leather. No over-wetting, no shrinkage.
  • Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning — Carpets, hardwood, and tile cleaned to landlord and inspector standards.

COMMERCIAL SERVICES 

 Commercial Floor Care Services — DC, Maryland & Virginia

  • Commercial Carpet Cleaning — Hot-water extraction and low-moisture encapsulation. After-hours so operations don't stop.
  • Janitorial Services — Routine cleaning, restroom sanitation, waste, disinfecting. EPA-registered chemistry, COI-ready crews.
  • Tile + Grout Cleaning — Deep cleaning and color sealing for lobbies, restrooms, kitchens.
  • Upholstery + Leather Cleaning — Office furniture, hospitality fabrics, leather seating.
  • Hard Surface Floor Restoration — VCT, LVT, terrazzo, marble, natural stone — strip, scrub, polish, protect.
  • Commercial Concrete Polishing — Durable, high-gloss polished concrete for warehouses, showrooms, and modern offices.
  • Hardwood Floor Refinishing — Sand, stain, and seal for offices, retail, and hospitality hardwood.
  • EPA-Approved Disinfecting — Hospital-grade chemistry for healthcare, schools, food service.
  •

settings.title: How Our Process Works
settings.subtitle: The Midland Process Explained
settings.content: Our process makes it easy for you to see exactly how we deliver quality results and complete client satisfaction — clear steps, no guesswork, and a smooth experience from first visit to final clean.

settings.title: Site Evaluation
settings.description: Our experienced team will conduct a comprehensive site visit to evaluate your specific cleaning needs.

settings.title: Facility Score
settings.description: We will provide you with yourFacility Score – a detailed assessment of your space's current condition & cleaning requirements.

settings.title: Get a Quote
settings.description: We guarantee a quick turnaround, providing you with a comprehensive program quote within 24 to 48 hours following our site visit.

settings.title: Schedule Your Service
settings.description: We will work with you to schedule the cleaning at a time that is most convenient for you and your facility.
